remediation_text: Enable MFA for all users via Security Defaults or Conditional Access policy
portal_steps: Entra ID > Properties > Manage Security defaults > Enabled
risk_if_not_fixed: Account takeover via phishing or credential replay is trivially achievable.

remediation_text: Enforce MFA on every account holding a privileged directory role
portal_steps: Entra ID > Security > Conditional Access > New policy > Grant > Require MFA
risk_if_not_fixed: Compromise of any admin leads to tenant-wide impact.

remediation_text: Configure recurring access reviews for all guest users
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_access_review_definition" "guests" { display_name = "Guest Review" descriptionForAdmins = "Quarterly guest review" scope { query = "/groups/{guest-group-id}/transitiveMembers" queryType = "MicrosoftGraph" } }
portal_steps: Entra ID > Identity Governance > Access reviews > New access review
risk_if_not_fixed: Stale guest accounts accumulate and expand the attack surface.

remediation_text: Remove custom RBAC roles that grant owner-equivalent permissions
terraform_snippet: # No create; the fix is to remove. Use:\n# terraform state rm azurerm_role_definition.custom_owner
portal_steps: Subscriptions > IAM > Roles > Custom > Delete
risk_if_not_fixed: Custom owner roles bypass PIM and audit paths applied to built-in Owner.

remediation_text: Apply Conditional Access requiring MFA to the subscription owner group
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_conditional_access_policy" "owners_mfa" { display_name = "Owners MFA" state = "enabled" conditions { users { included_groups = [var.owners_group_id] } applications { included_applications = ["797f4846-ba00-4fd7-ba43-dac1f8f63013"] } } grant_controls { operator = "OR" built_in_controls = ["mfa"] } }
portal_steps: Entra ID > Security > Conditional Access > New > Users: Owners group > Grant MFA
risk_if_not_fixed: Owner compromise leads to complete loss of the subscription.

remediation_text: Restrict guest invitation capability to admin roles
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_directory_setting" "b2b" { display_name = "Group.Unified" values { name = "AllowInvitesFrom" value = "adminsAndGuestInviters" } }
portal_steps: Entra ID > External Identities > External collaboration settings
risk_if_not_fixed: Unvetted external accounts can be invited into the tenant.

remediation_text: Delete expired service principal credentials and rotate via pipeline
terraform_snippet: # Remediation is deletion, not creation\n# null_resource with local-exec calling az ad sp credential delete
portal_steps: Entra ID > App registrations > Select app > Certificates & secrets > Delete expired
risk_if_not_fixed: Expired creds indicate rotation failure and may leak in source control.

remediation_text: Block legacy authentication via Conditional Access policy
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_conditional_access_policy" "block_legacy" { display_name = "Block Legacy Auth" state = "enabled" conditions { client_app_types = ["exchangeActiveSync", "other"] users { included_users = ["All"] } applications { included_applications = ["All"] } } grant_controls { operator = "OR" built_in_controls = ["block"] } }
portal_steps: Entra ID > Conditional Access > New > Client apps: Other + Exchange ActiveSync > Block
risk_if_not_fixed: Legacy protocols bypass MFA and are the top vector for password spray.

remediation_text: Enable end-user notification on password reset events
terraform_snippet: # Graph: authenticationMethodsPolicy\n# Terraform support limited; use null_resource
portal_steps: Entra ID > Password reset > Notifications > Notify users on password resets: Yes
risk_if_not_fixed: Users are unaware of illicit password reset attempts.

remediation_text: Reduce subscription owner count to 3 or fewer; prefer PIM eligible
terraform_snippet: # removal operation\n# use azurerm_role_assignment destroy
portal_steps: Subscriptions > IAM > Owners > Remove
risk_if_not_fixed: Excess owners increase blast radius of credential compromise.

remediation_text: Remove all role assignments from accounts that are disabled
terraform_snippet: # removal operation
azure_cli_command: for id in $(az role assignment list --query "[?principalType=='User'].id" -o tsv); do az role assignment delete --ids $id; done
portal_steps: Entra ID > Users > Disabled > Assigned roles > Remove
risk_if_not_fixed: Disabled accounts can be re-enabled by an attacker and retain privilege.

remediation_text: Remove privileged roles from guest users
terraform_snippet: # removal
portal_steps: Entra ID > Roles and administrators > Select role > Remove guest members
risk_if_not_fixed: External identities with admin rights expand the trust boundary.

remediation_text: Create access reviews for each privileged Entra directory role
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_privileged_access_group_assignment_schedule" "admins" { group_id = var.group_id principal_id = var.principal_id access_id = "member" assignment_type = "assigned" }
portal_steps: Entra ID > Identity Governance > Privileged Access > Access reviews
risk_if_not_fixed: Stale privileged assignments persist undetected.

remediation_text: Convert permanent privileged role assignments to PIM eligible
terraform_snippet: # PIM eligible assignment\nresource "azuread_privileged_access_group_eligibility_schedule" "ga" { group_id = var.group_id principal_id = var.principal_id access_id = "member" duration = "P365D" }
portal_steps: Entra ID > PIM > Azure AD roles > Assignments > Make eligible
risk_if_not_fixed: Standing privilege means compromise equals instant admin.

remediation_text: Revoke high-risk Graph application permissions from App Registrations
terraform_snippet: # removal; using azuread_application_api_access
portal_steps: Entra ID > App registrations > API permissions > Remove
risk_if_not_fixed: Over-privileged apps enable tenant-wide persistence via OAuth.

remediation_text: Enable Microsoft Defender for Servers Plan 2 on the subscription
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_security_center_subscription_pricing" "servers" { tier = "Standard" resource_type = "VirtualMachines" subplan = "P2" }
azure_cli_command: az security pricing create --name VirtualMachines --tier Standard --subplan P2
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Environment settings > Plans > Servers > On
risk_if_not_fixed: VMs lack EDR and vulnerability telemetry.

remediation_text: Enable Defender for App Service on the subscription
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_security_center_subscription_pricing" "appsvc" { tier = "Standard" resource_type = "AppServices" }
azure_cli_command: az security pricing create --name AppServices --tier Standard
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Environment settings > Plans > App Service > On
risk_if_not_fixed: Webshells and compromise of App Service go undetected.

remediation_text: Enable Defender for SQL (Databases) on the subscription
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_security_center_subscription_pricing" "sql" { tier = "Standard" resource_type = "SqlServers" }
azure_cli_command: az security pricing create --name SqlServers --tier Standard
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Environment settings > Plans > Databases > On
risk_if_not_fixed: SQL injection and credential abuse go undetected.

remediation_text: Enable Defender for Storage on the subscription
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_security_center_subscription_pricing" "storage" { tier = "Standard" resource_type = "StorageAccounts" subplan = "DefenderForStorageV2" }
azure_cli_command: az security pricing create --name StorageAccounts --tier Standard --subplan DefenderForStorageV2
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Environment settings > Plans > Storage > On
risk_if_not_fixed: Malware upload and anomalous access go undetected.

remediation_text: Enable Defender for Containers on the subscription
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_security_center_subscription_pricing" "containers" { tier = "Standard" resource_type = "Containers" }
azure_cli_command: az security pricing create --name Containers --tier Standard
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Environment settings > Plans > Containers > On
risk_if_not_fixed: AKS runtime compromise and vulnerable images go undetected.

remediation_text: Enable Defender for Key Vault on the subscription
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_security_center_subscription_pricing" "kv" { tier = "Standard" resource_type = "KeyVaults" }
azure_cli_command: az security pricing create --name KeyVaults --tier Standard
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Environment settings > Plans > Key Vault > On
risk_if_not_fixed: Secret enumeration and abnormal access go undetected.

remediation_text: Enable Defender for DNS on the subscription
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_security_center_subscription_pricing" "dns" { tier = "Standard" resource_type = "Dns" }
azure_cli_command: az security pricing create --name Dns --tier Standard
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Environment settings > Plans > DNS > On
risk_if_not_fixed: C2 and exfil via DNS tunneling is not detected.

remediation_text: Enable Defender for Resource Manager on the subscription
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_security_center_subscription_pricing" "arm" { tier = "Standard" resource_type = "Arm" }
azure_cli_command: az security pricing create --name Arm --tier Standard
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Environment settings > Plans > Resource Manager > On
risk_if_not_fixed: Control-plane attacks on ARM go undetected.

remediation_text: Require HTTPS-only on all storage accounts
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_storage_account" "example" { enable_https_traffic_only = true }
portal_steps: Storage account > Configuration > Secure transfer required: Enabled
risk_if_not_fixed: Plaintext data and keys can be intercepted on the wire.

remediation_text: Enable infrastructure encryption on storage accounts (requires recreation)
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_storage_account" "example" { infrastructure_encryption_enabled = true }
azure_cli_command: az storage account create --name <name> --resource-group <rg> --require-infrastructure-encryption true --sku Standard_LRS --location <loc>
portal_steps: Create new storage account > Encryption > Enable infrastructure encryption
risk_if_not_fixed: Single-layer encryption leaves exposure if platform key is compromised.

remediation_text: Disallow public blob access on storage accounts
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_storage_account" "example" { allow_nested_items_to_be_public = false }
portal_steps: Storage account > Configuration > Allow Blob public access: Disabled
risk_if_not_fixed: Anonymous enumeration and download of blobs becomes trivial.

remediation_text: Set storage account network default action to Deny
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_storage_account" "example" { network_rules { default_action = "Deny" bypass = ["AzureServices"] } }
azure_cli_command: az storage account update --name <name> --resource-group <rg> --default-action Deny --bypass AzureServices
portal_steps: Storage account > Networking > Public network access: Enabled from selected networks
risk_if_not_fixed: Open network ACL permits access from any source IP.

remediation_text: Create a Private Endpoint for the storage account
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_private_endpoint" "sa" { name = "pe-sa" location = var.loc resource_group_name = var.rg subnet_id = var.subnet_id private_service_connection { name = "psc" private_connection_resource_id = azurerm_storage_account.example.id subresource_names = ["blob"] is_manual_connection = false } }
azure_cli_command: az network private-endpoint create --name pe-sa --resource-group <rg> --vnet-name <vnet> --subnet <subnet> --private-connection-resource-id <sa-id> --group-id blob --connection-name sa
portal_steps: Storage account > Networking > Private endpoint connections > Create
risk_if_not_fixed: Storage traffic traverses the public internet.

remediation_text: Enable blob soft delete with 7+ day retention
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_storage_account_blob_container_sas" "_" {}\nresource "azurerm_storage_account" "example" { blob_properties { delete_retention_policy { days = 7 } } }
azure_cli_command: az storage account blob-service-properties update --account-name <name> --enable-delete-retention true --delete-retention-days 7
portal_steps: Storage account > Data protection > Enable soft delete for blobs (7 days)
risk_if_not_fixed: Accidental or malicious blob deletion is unrecoverable.

remediation_text: Enable container soft delete with 7+ day retention
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_storage_account" "example" { blob_properties { container_delete_retention_policy { days = 7 } } }
azure_cli_command: az storage account blob-service-properties update --account-name <name> --enable-container-delete-retention true --container-delete-retention-days 7
portal_steps: Storage account > Data protection > Enable soft delete for containers (7 days)
risk_if_not_fixed: Deleted containers destroy all contained blobs permanently.

remediation_text: Enable classic diagnostic logging for queue and table services
terraform_snippet: # Using azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting\nresource "azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting" "queue" { name = "queuediag" target_resource_id = "${azurerm_storage_account.example.id}/queueServices/default" log_analytics_workspace_id = var.law_id enabled_log { category = "StorageRead" } enabled_log { category = "StorageWrite" } enabled_log { category = "StorageDelete" } }
portal_steps: Storage account > Diagnostic settings (classic) > Queue / Table
risk_if_not_fixed: No audit trail on data-plane operations impedes IR.

remediation_text: Enable extended auditing on Azure SQL servers
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_mssql_server_extended_auditing_policy" "audit" { server_id = azurerm_mssql_server.example.id log_monitoring_enabled = true }
azure_cli_command: az sql server audit-policy update --name <server> --resource-group <rg> --state Enabled --lats Enabled
portal_steps: SQL server > Auditing > Enable > Send to Log Analytics
risk_if_not_fixed: SQL activity forensics is impossible without audit logs.

remediation_text: Enable Transparent Data Encryption on SQL databases
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_mssql_database" "db" { transparent_data_encryption_enabled = true }
azure_cli_command: az sql db tde set --database <db> --server <server> --resource-group <rg> --status Enabled
portal_steps: SQL database > Transparent data encryption: Enabled
risk_if_not_fixed: Unencrypted storage-layer data at rest.

remediation_text: Enable SQL threat detection (security alert policy)
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_mssql_server_security_alert_policy" "alert" { resource_group_name = var.rg server_name = azurerm_mssql_server.example.name state = "Enabled" }
azure_cli_command: az sql server threat-policy update --name <server> --resource-group <rg> --state Enabled
portal_steps: SQL server > Microsoft Defender for SQL > Enable
risk_if_not_fixed: SQL injection and anomalous access go undetected.

remediation_text: Disable public network access on SQL server
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_mssql_server" "example" { public_network_access_enabled = false }
portal_steps: SQL server > Networking > Public network access: Disable
risk_if_not_fixed: SQL server remains exposed to public network scans.

remediation_text: Enforce SSL on Azure Database for PostgreSQL
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_postgresql_server" "example" { ssl_enforcement_enabled = true }
portal_steps: PostgreSQL server > Connection security > Enforce SSL: Enabled
risk_if_not_fixed: Plaintext credentials and queries on the wire.

remediation_text: Enforce SSL on Azure Database for MySQL
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_mysql_server" "example" { ssl_enforcement_enabled = true }
portal_steps: MySQL server > Connection security > Enforce SSL: Enabled
risk_if_not_fixed: Plaintext credentials and queries on the wire.

remediation_text: Create subscription-scope diagnostic setting exporting activity log
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting" "sub" { name = "subdiag" target_resource_id = "/subscriptions/${var.sub_id}" log_analytics_workspace_id = var.law_id enabled_log { category = "Administrative" } }
azure_cli_command: az monitor diagnostic-settings subscription create --name subdiag --location global --workspace <law-id> --logs @subdiag-logs.json
portal_steps: Monitor > Activity log > Export activity logs
risk_if_not_fixed: No centralized activity log audit trail.

remediation_text: Set activity log retention to at least 365 days
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_storage_management_policy" "archive" { storage_account_id = var.archive_sa rule { name = "retain" filters { blob_types = ["blockBlob"] } actions { base_blob { delete_after_days_since_modification_greater_than = 365 } } } }
azure_cli_command: az monitor log-profiles update --name default --retention-policy days=365 enabled=true
portal_steps: Monitor > Diagnostic settings > Retention (days): 365
risk_if_not_fixed: Forensic investigations are blinded beyond the retention window.

remediation_text: Create activity log alert on policyAssignments write/delete
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert" "policy" { name = "policy-change" resource_group_name = var.rg scopes = ["/subscriptions/${var.sub}"] criteria { category = "Administrative" operation_name = "Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments/write" } action { action_group_id = var.ag_id } }
azure_cli_command: az monitor activity-log alert create --name policy-change --resource-group <rg> --condition category=Administrative and operationName=Microsoft.Authorization/policyAssignments/write --action-group <ag>
portal_steps: Monitor > Alerts > New rule > Activity log > Create policy assignment
risk_if_not_fixed: Unauthorized policy changes go unnoticed.

remediation_text: Create activity log alert on NSG write/delete
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert" "nsg" { name = "nsg-change" resource_group_name = var.rg scopes = ["/subscriptions/${var.sub}"] criteria { category = "Administrative" operation_name = "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/write" } action { action_group_id = var.ag_id } }
azure_cli_command: az monitor activity-log alert create --name nsg-change --resource-group <rg> --condition category=Administrative and operationName=Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups/write --action-group <ag>
portal_steps: Monitor > Alerts > New > Signal: NSG write
risk_if_not_fixed: Lateral movement via NSG change goes unnoticed.

remediation_text: Create activity log alert on Microsoft.Security/securitySolutions changes
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert" "secsol" { name = "secsol-change" resource_group_name = var.rg scopes = ["/subscriptions/${var.sub}"] criteria { category = "Administrative" operation_name = "Microsoft.Security/securitySolutions/write" } action { action_group_id = var.ag_id } }
azure_cli_command: az monitor activity-log alert create --name secsol-change --resource-group <rg> --condition category=Administrative and operationName=Microsoft.Security/securitySolutions/write --action-group <ag>
portal_steps: Monitor > Alerts > New > Signal: securitySolutions
risk_if_not_fixed: Attackers can silently disable Defender components.

remediation_text: Create activity log alert on SQL firewallRules changes
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_monitor_activity_log_alert" "sqlfw" { name = "sqlfw-change" resource_group_name = var.rg scopes = ["/subscriptions/${var.sub}"] criteria { category = "Administrative" operation_name = "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules/write" } action { action_group_id = var.ag_id } }
azure_cli_command: az monitor activity-log alert create --name sqlfw-change --resource-group <rg> --condition category=Administrative and operationName=Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules/write --action-group <ag>
portal_steps: Monitor > Alerts > New > Signal: SQL firewallRules
risk_if_not_fixed: SQL firewall exposure to internet can be added without alert.

remediation_text: Remove NSG rules allowing SSH (22) from Any/Internet
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_network_security_rule" "ssh" { name = "deny-ssh-inbound" priority = 4000 direction = "Inbound" access = "Deny" protocol = "Tcp" source_port_range = "*" destination_port_range = "22" source_address_prefix = "Internet" destination_address_prefix = "*" }
portal_steps: NSG > Inbound rules > Remove/Deny 22 from Any
risk_if_not_fixed: Continuous brute-force on SSH leads to compromise.

remediation_text: Remove NSG rules allowing RDP (3389) from Any/Internet
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_network_security_rule" "rdp" { name = "deny-rdp-inbound" priority = 4001 direction = "Inbound" access = "Deny" protocol = "Tcp" source_port_range = "*" destination_port_range = "3389" source_address_prefix = "Internet" destination_address_prefix = "*" }
portal_steps: NSG > Inbound rules > Remove/Deny 3389 from Any
risk_if_not_fixed: RDP brute-force is the top ransomware vector.

remediation_text: Restrict NSG UDP rules to specific sources
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_network_security_rule" "udp" { name = "deny-udp-any" priority = 4002 direction = "Inbound" access = "Deny" protocol = "Udp" source_port_range = "*" destination_port_range = "*" source_address_prefix = "Internet" destination_address_prefix = "*" }
portal_steps: NSG > Inbound rules > Edit UDP sources
risk_if_not_fixed: UDP services enable amplification and abuse.

remediation_text: Create Network Watcher in each active region
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_network_watcher" "nw" { name = "nw-${var.region}" location = var.region resource_group_name = "NetworkWatcherRG" }
azure_cli_command: az network watcher configure --locations <region> --enabled true --resource-group NetworkWatcherRG
portal_steps: Network Watcher > Overview > Enable in region
risk_if_not_fixed: Flow logs and packet capture are unavailable for IR.

remediation_text: Enable NSG flow logs with retention
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_network_watcher_flow_log" "fl" { network_watcher_name = var.nw_name resource_group_name = "NetworkWatcherRG" network_security_group_id = var.nsg_id storage_account_id = var.sa_id enabled = true retention_policy { enabled = true days = 90 } }
azure_cli_command: az network watcher flow-log create --location <region> --resource-group <rg> --nsg <nsg-id> --storage-account <sa-id> --enabled true --retention 90
portal_steps: Network Watcher > NSG flow logs > Create
risk_if_not_fixed: Network activity forensics is impossible without flow logs.

remediation_text: Remove public IPs from management VMs; use Bastion
terraform_snippet: # removal\n# terraform destroy azurerm_public_ip.mgmt
azure_cli_command: az network nic ip-config update --name <ip-config> --nic-name <nic> --resource-group <rg> --remove PublicIPAddress
portal_steps: VM > Networking > Detach public IP
risk_if_not_fixed: Management plane exposed to internet scanners.

remediation_text: Deploy Microsoft Antimalware or MDE onboarding extension to VMs
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_virtual_machine_extension" "antimalware" { name = "IaaSAntimalware" virtual_machine_id = azurerm_linux_virtual_machine.vm.id publisher = "Microsoft.Azure.Security" type = "IaaSAntimalware" type_handler_version = "1.5" }
azure_cli_command: az vm extension set --name IaaSAntimalware --publisher Microsoft.Azure.Security --vm-name <vm> --resource-group <rg>
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Recommendations > Endpoint protection should be installed > Fix
risk_if_not_fixed: VMs lack malware prevention and detection.

remediation_text: Enable encryption at host on VMs or use Azure Disk Encryption
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_linux_virtual_machine" "vm" { encryption_at_host_enabled = true }
portal_steps: VM > Disks > Additional settings > Encryption at host: Enabled
risk_if_not_fixed: OS disk plaintext if storage is compromised.

remediation_text: Encrypt data disks with disk encryption set
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_managed_disk" "data" { disk_encryption_set_id = azurerm_disk_encryption_set.des.id storage_account_type = "Premium_LRS" create_option = "Empty" disk_size_gb = 128 name = "data1" location = var.loc resource_group_name = var.rg }
portal_steps: VM > Disks > Data disks > Encryption type: CMK
risk_if_not_fixed: Data disk contents are not protected by CMK.

remediation_text: Enable Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Management on VMs
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_security_center_server_vulnerability_assessment_virtual_machine" "vm" { virtual_machine_id = azurerm_linux_virtual_machine.vm.id }
azure_cli_command: az vm extension set --name MDE.Linux --publisher Microsoft.Azure.AzureDefenderForServers --vm-name <vm> --resource-group <rg>
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Recommendations > Machines should have vulnerability findings resolved
risk_if_not_fixed: Known CVEs remain unscanned and exploitable.

remediation_text: Enable soft delete and purge protection on Key Vault
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_key_vault" "kv" { soft_delete_retention_days = 90 purge_protection_enabled = true }
portal_steps: Key Vault > Properties > Soft delete / Purge protection
risk_if_not_fixed: Keys and secrets can be permanently destroyed by an attacker.

remediation_text: Define key rotation policy in Key Vault
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_key_vault_key" "k" { name = "cmk" key_vault_id = azurerm_key_vault.kv.id key_type = "RSA" key_size = 2048 rotation_policy { automatic { time_before_expiry = "P30D" } expire_after = "P2Y" notify_before_expiry = "P29D" } }
portal_steps: Key Vault > Keys > Select key > Rotation policy
risk_if_not_fixed: Long-lived keys increase exposure from compromise.

remediation_text: Configure Key Vault diagnostic settings
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting" "kv" { name = "kvdiag" target_resource_id = azurerm_key_vault.kv.id log_analytics_workspace_id = var.law_id enabled_log { category = "AuditEvent" } }
portal_steps: Key Vault > Diagnostic settings > Add
risk_if_not_fixed: No audit trail of secret access.

remediation_text: Deploy private endpoint for Key Vault and disable public access
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_key_vault" "kv" { public_network_access_enabled = false }\nresource "azurerm_private_endpoint" "kv" { name = "pe-kv" subnet_id = var.subnet_id private_service_connection { name = "psc" is_manual_connection = false private_connection_resource_id = azurerm_key_vault.kv.id subresource_names = ["vault"] } location = var.loc resource_group_name = var.rg }
azure_cli_command: az keyvault update --name <kv> --public-network-access Disabled && az network private-endpoint create --name pe-kv --vnet-name <vnet> --subnet <subnet> --private-connection-resource-id <kv-id> --group-id vault --connection-name kv --resource-group <rg>
portal_steps: Key Vault > Networking > Private endpoint connections
risk_if_not_fixed: Secret access traverses public internet.

remediation_text: Ensure Key Vault diagnostic logs capture AuditEvent category
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_monitor_diagnostic_setting" "kv_audit" { name = "kv-audit" target_resource_id = azurerm_key_vault.kv.id log_analytics_workspace_id = var.law_id enabled_log { category = "AuditEvent" } }
portal_steps: Key Vault > Diagnostic settings > Logs > AuditEvent
risk_if_not_fixed: No visibility into secret access forensics.

remediation_text: Enforce HTTPS only on App Service
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_linux_web_app" "app" { https_only = true }
portal_steps: App Service > TLS/SSL settings > HTTPS Only: On
risk_if_not_fixed: Plaintext cookies and credentials on the wire.

remediation_text: Set App Service minimum TLS version to 1.2
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_linux_web_app" "app" { site_config { minimum_tls_version = "1.2" } }
portal_steps: App Service > TLS/SSL > Minimum TLS version: 1.2
risk_if_not_fixed: Deprecated TLS versions are vulnerable to downgrade attacks.

remediation_text: Disable remote debugging on App Service
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_linux_web_app" "app" { site_config { remote_debugging_enabled = false } }
portal_steps: App Service > Configuration > General settings > Remote debugging: Off
risk_if_not_fixed: Exposed remote debug enables code execution.

remediation_text: Enable HTTP/2 on App Service
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_linux_web_app" "app" { site_config { http2_enabled = true } }
portal_steps: App Service > Configuration > General > HTTP version: 2.0
risk_if_not_fixed: Missing HTTP/2 reduces connection security negotiation.

remediation_text: Configure managed identity on App Service
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_linux_web_app" "app" { identity { type = "SystemAssigned" } }
portal_steps: App Service > Identity > System assigned: On
risk_if_not_fixed: Hard-coded credentials proliferate in application config.

remediation_text: Require phishing-resistant authentication for admins (FIDO2/WHfB)
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_conditional_access_policy" "pr_auth" { display_name = "Phish-resistant for admins" state = "enabled" conditions { users { included_roles = ["62e90394-69f5-4237-9190-012177145e10"] } applications { included_applications = ["All"] } } grant_controls { operator = "AND" built_in_controls = ["mfa"] authentication_strength_policy_id = var.fido2_strength_id } }
portal_steps: Entra ID > Security > CAP > Grant: Require authentication strength
risk_if_not_fixed: SMS/TOTP MFA can be bypassed via AiTM phishing.

remediation_text: Enforce device compliance for privileged actions
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_conditional_access_policy" "compliant" { display_name = "Require compliant device" state = "enabled" conditions { users { included_users = ["All"] } applications { included_applications = ["All"] } } grant_controls { operator = "OR" built_in_controls = ["compliantDevice"] } }
portal_steps: Entra ID > CAP > New > Grant: Require device to be compliant
risk_if_not_fixed: Unmanaged devices can stage session hijack.

remediation_text: Block sign-in from high-risk locations
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_conditional_access_policy" "geo" { display_name = "Block risky geos" state = "enabled" conditions { users { included_users = ["All"] } applications { included_applications = ["All"] } locations { included_locations = [var.blocked_geo_id] } } grant_controls { operator = "OR" built_in_controls = ["block"] } }
portal_steps: Entra ID > CAP > Conditions: Locations > Block
risk_if_not_fixed: Attacker infrastructure IPs sign in unobstructed.

remediation_text: Enforce sign-in risk Conditional Access
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_conditional_access_policy" "risk" { display_name = "Require MFA on risky sign-in" state = "enabled" conditions { sign_in_risk_levels = ["high", "medium"] users { included_users = ["All"] } applications { included_applications = ["All"] } } grant_controls { operator = "OR" built_in_controls = ["mfa"] } }
portal_steps: Entra ID > CAP > Conditions: Sign-in risk: High/Medium
risk_if_not_fixed: Risk signals from Identity Protection go un-acted.

remediation_text: Enforce user risk Conditional Access requiring password change
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_conditional_access_policy" "userrisk" { display_name = "User risk: change password" state = "enabled" conditions { user_risk_levels = ["high"] users { included_users = ["All"] } applications { included_applications = ["All"] } } grant_controls { operator = "AND" built_in_controls = ["mfa", "passwordChange"] } }
portal_steps: Entra ID > CAP > User risk: High > Grant: require password change
risk_if_not_fixed: Known compromised accounts continue to authenticate.

remediation_text: Limit Entra session lifetime via CAP
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_conditional_access_policy" "session" { display_name = "Session limits" state = "enabled" conditions { users { included_users = ["All"] } applications { included_applications = ["All"] } } session_controls { sign_in_frequency { value = 8 type = "hours" } persistent_browser_mode = "never" } }
portal_steps: Entra ID > CAP > Session > Sign-in frequency: 8h
risk_if_not_fixed: Stolen session tokens remain valid for days.

remediation_text: Disallow user consent to third-party applications
terraform_snippet: # Use az CLI post-apply; no first-class terraform resource
portal_steps: Entra ID > Enterprise apps > User consent settings > Do not allow
risk_if_not_fixed: Illicit OAuth consent grants persist as long-lived backdoors.

remediation_text: Require admin consent workflow for all app permissions
terraform_snippet: # Graph PATCH adminConsentRequestPolicy — no terraform provider
portal_steps: Entra ID > Enterprise apps > User consent > Admin consent requests
risk_if_not_fixed: Users grant app permissions without review.

remediation_text: Enforce just-in-time VM access via Defender for Cloud
terraform_snippet: resource "azurerm_security_center_server_vulnerability_assessment_virtual_machine" "vm" { virtual_machine_id = var.vm_id }
portal_steps: Defender for Cloud > Workload protections > JIT VM access
risk_if_not_fixed: Management ports remain continuously open.

remediation_text: Disable standing access; require PIM activation for Contributor role
terraform_snippet: resource "azuread_privileged_access_group_eligibility_schedule" "contrib" { group_id = var.contributors_group_id principal_id = var.principal_id access_id = "member" duration = "P180D" }
portal_steps: PIM > Azure resources > Roles > Contributor > Assignments > Eligible
risk_if_not_fixed: Standing Contributor access enables immediate impact on compromise.

remediation_text: Remove high-privilege application-level Graph permissions from App Registration
terraform_snippet: # removal via azuread_application
portal_steps: Entra ID > App registrations > API permissions > Remove
risk_if_not_fixed: Tenant-wide persistence via app-only Graph access.
